summary: 3PL consolidating ~230 micro-merchants under a master account using multi-node rate rules.
reference_quote: Rate rules cut surcharges noticeably; onboarding was guided but required custom mapping.
notes: Requested deeper returns portal customization and SLA breach alerts.

summary: Mid-market D2C brand with seasonal spikes; using Shopify + NetSuite integration.
reference_quote: NetSuite connector worked after initial fix; we want more granular carrier performance insights.
notes: Interested in predictive ETAs and promise-date accuracy reports.

summary: Switched from ShipStation due to rate-shopping features.
reference_quote: January 11 had elevated errors for ~45 minutes; support responded quickly.
notes: Asks for label void automation and better exception handling.

summary: Marketplace shipping orchestration across 3 regional carriers.
reference_quote: Regional carrier integration saved costs but onboarding took longer than expected.
notes: Wants SLA-based routing templates per warehouse.

summary: Small merchant; migrated from manual carrier portals.
reference_quote: Setup was straightforward; returns portal is basic but works.
notes: Price sensitive, may downgrade if volumes drop.

reference_quote: We need better weather/holiday delay predictions; otherwise solid.

summary: Canceled after 5 months due to internal consolidation.
reference_quote: Billing confusion on overage; canceled during tool consolidation.
notes: Requested pro-rated refund; churn reason recorded as consolidation.

summary: Trialing Business tier features for two warehouses.
reference_quote: So far so good; evaluating returns analytics.
notes: Trial decision expected by April end.
